chapter_title.en: Chapter on What Has Been Reported Regarding the Child of Adultery and the Foundling

text: 3528 - رَوَى سَعِيدُ بْنُ يَسَارٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : "لاَ بَأْسَ بِأَنْ يُعْتَقَ وَلَدُ اَلزِّنَا".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.3528 - It is narrated from Sa'id ibn Yasar, who said:
"Abu Abdullah (as), said: 'There is no harm in emancipating the child born out of wedlock.' "
